reason: All deep-review findings are corrected at dcc3829d with 82 focused tests; final root gates, fresh canary, and repeat exact-head review remain.

orchestrationDecisions.reason: Three independent scouts audited GitHub topology, main-branch Pi infrastructure, and the exact Pi SDK surface without mutation.
Six focused test entries and offline Pi command discovery failed on absent production modules before implementation, satisfying the manual RED gate.
Independent core and SDK workers were integrated, then reviewer findings became fail-closed regression tests; 38 focused tests, strict TypeScript, and offline Pi registration pass.

Two zero-tool openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol xhigh AgentSessions independently assessed PR #438 at exact clean head 21d195aff0c7bd60b3bf54f14b1ce165cec9e03f; both succeeded, score was 0.9819, hard gates were empty, and post-run target state was unchanged.

Cross-process double dispatch, early-stop, delayed-create abort, hung cleanup, and graceful-shutdown state reproductions were added and corrected with a global fenced lease, lifecycle cancellation, and bounded unconditional cleanup; 49 focused tests and strict TypeScript pass.
Checkpoint ccf0daf3 completed generation 2 against exact clean PR #438 head with both zero-tool lanes successful, score 0.9794, no hard gates, the global lease released, and target state unchanged.

Ten critical and six warning findings were reproduced and corrected in three parallel test-first lanes; root integration added a strict-TypeScript buffer correction and a launch-resolution race regression. The complete focused suite is 82/82 green, strict TypeScript and offline Pi registration pass, and the earlier canary is marked historical pending a hardened-head rerun.
